summary: Reworked constellation topology system: reduced instance counts from 8-15 to 2-3 (quality tiers), increased instance scale from [0.3,0.7] to [1.2,2.0] for hero-sized polyhedra, increased MIN_SEPARATION from 0.8 to 3.0 and spread radius from 2.5 to 3.5 for clear separation, and replaced uniform topology selection with weighted selection favouring icosahedron (0.45) and octahedron (0.45) over tetrahedron (0.10). Updated 13 existing tests and added 9 new tests (T-071-01 through T-071-09) covering instance cap, separation enforcement, hero scale range, topology weight bias, vertex count bounds, and error-free operation.
